## Verification

- [ ] `node --test tests/bridge_safety.test.mjs tests/bridge_workflows.test.mjs tests/bridge_file_actions.test.mjs tests/panel_parse_actions.test.mjs tests/panel_payload.test.mjs`
- [ ] `node --check bridge/server.js`
- [ ] Manual extension check, if UI changed
